best_testcase_text: test case id: tc-comment-001 title: leaving a comment on a post module: comment source pages: 3,4 preconditions: user is logged in and a post exists. test data: - comment content: "test comment content" test steps: 1. user clicks on the post to view it. 2. user clicks on the comment button. 3. user enters comment content. 4. user clicks on the "leave comment" button. 5. system saves the comment. 6. system displays the comment under the post. expected result: - comment is successfully left and displayed under the post.
